allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $img = [System.Drawing.Bitmap]::FromFile\("C:\\Users\\thiag\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\05cd4576-ff5b-49d3-866a-15f8578305f8.png"\); $px = $img.GetPixel\([int]\($img.Width/2\), [int]\($img.Height/2\)\); Write-Host "R:$\($px.R\) G:$\($px.G\) B:$\($px.B\) | Hex: #$\('{0:X2}{1:X2}{2:X2}' -f $px.R,$px.G,$px.B\)"; $img.Dispose\(\))
